title: Overlay refinements: enable receiver own slot, restyle counter overlay
description: Round 2 follow-ups to the full-screen overlay rework. (1) Receiver's own commander slot in the cmdr dmg overlay must be tappable so stolen-commander damage can be recorded; replace the dim/disable with a small (you) badge. (2) Counter and Action overlays look tiny at full screen; rework CounterOverlay to a fixed 2x2 grid that fills the viewport and restyle to match the life-counter visual language (large white shadowed value, dark circular icon buttons). See plan at C:\Users\ryan9\.claude\plans\testing-of-the-app-jiggly-papert.md
close_reason: Implemented round-2 overlay refinements. (1) Receiver's own slot in CommanderDamageOverlay is now fully tappable with a small (you) badge top-left, so stolen-commander damage can be recorded. (2) CounterOverlay reworked to a 2x2 grid that fills the viewport (no scrolling for the 4-item case) with life-counter visual language: titleMedium label, displaySmall white shadowed value, 36px dark circular icon buttons. Fallback GridView path retained for non-4-item callers. flutter analyze: no issues.

title: Rework overlays to full-screen with unique commander damage layout
description: Counter and Action overlays become full-screen (rotated for top-row players). Commander Damage overlay becomes a unique full-screen view mirroring the life tracker layout, where each opposing player slot shows damage that commander dealt to the receiver. Partners split slots horizontally. See plan at C:\Users\ryan9\.claude\plans\testing-of-the-app-jiggly-papert.md
close_reason: Implemented full-screen overlay rework: Counter and Action overlays now fill viewport (rotated 180 for top-row players); new CommanderDamageOverlay mirrors life tracker layout per receiver, splitting partner commanders horizontally. flutter analyze: no issues.
